translations.en: a muscular knight. He speaks in a raspy voice.
translations.zh: 體魄雄健之武士，聲音沙啞。

translations.en: "Thou art most welcome in my castle, Avatar." He bows deeply to you.
translations.zh: 「聖者，歡迎蒞臨吾城。」他深深一揖。

translations.en: "I am the lord of Serpent's Hold."
"I personally favor the mantra of Valour."
"I taught it to the bard @Culham in a song."
translations.zh: 「吾已將此真言譜入歌中，傳授給吟遊詩人@Culham。」

translations.en: "He spends much time in Jhelom, though he be a @traveling bard."
translations.zh: 「他雖是@walking吟遊詩人，卻常在傑隆盤桓。」

translations.en: "Yes, there's no telling where one might find him."
"As I said, though, Jhelom is a good guess."
translations.zh: 「但如我所說，傑隆是個不錯的猜測。」

translations.en: "If I had a rune, I'd wear it proudly."
translations.zh: 「若吾手持符文，必當引以為傲。」

translations.en: "But others fear for the safety of such important talismans, hiding them in some peculiar places."
translations.zh: 「然他人憂慮此等重要護符之安危，將其藏於奇特之處。」

translations.en: "I wonder if 'tis considered theft to seize a rune laid out for all to see..."
translations.zh: 「吾不禁納悶——拾取擺在眾目睽睽之下的符文，算是盜竊嗎……」

translations.en: "Goodbye. I hope thou wilt visit me again when thou hast time, friend."
"I wish I could help thee with that, Avatar."

translator_notes: Simon 為巨蛇堡堡主、武士，口吻莊重但親切。@traveling bard 用 @walking 保留 keyword 觸發；Culham 為吟遊詩人，常駐傑隆。避 5C trail 字無問題。
